---
title: "Mónica Gómez-Vadillo"
subtitle: "PhD Student at MNCN-CSIC · Biogeography · Macroecology · Data Science"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: Images/curvas_nivel_edit.png
title-block-style: default
---

::: home-intro
# Hello to my personal blog 👋

## Exploring biodiversity through data and ecology

I am a PhD researcher working at the intersection of **biogeography**, **macroecology**, and **data science**.\
This website brings together my research interests, scientific writing, and data-driven projects.
:::

## Areas of work

::::::::: columns
:::: {.column width="33%"}
::: mini-card
#### 🔎 Research

I study biodiversity patterns, species distributions, and ecological niches across spatial scales, with a strong interest in macroecology and biogeography.
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}
::: mini-card
#### 📊 Data Science

I use R, Python, and reproducible workflows to analyse ecological data and build interactive tools.
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}
::: mini-card
#### 📒 Science Communication

I enjoy translating complex scientific ideas into accessible content through blog posts, outreach, and digital communication.
:::
::::
:::::::::

## Featured areas

::::::::: columns
:::: {.column width="33%"}
::: mini-card
#### **🌍 Biogeography & Macroecology**

Understanding how environmental and spatial processes shape biodiversity patterns.
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}
::: mini-card
#### **🧬 Ecological Niches**

Working with niche overlap, hypervolumes, and species co-occurrence.
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="33%"}
::: mini-card
#### **💻 Computational Ecology**

Building analytical pipelines and interactive tools for ecological research.
:::
::::
:::::::::
